name: Il Macello — The Slaughter
description: Circle 7 Boss (Violence). Industrial nightmare goat, a walking slaughterhouse.

textToImageTask.prompt: A towering bipedal humanoid goat demon in A-pose, grotesque industrial body where flesh and machinery merge, one arm is organic ending in a massive hoof-fist and the other arm is a mechanical piston-driven meat grinder appendage with spinning blades, iron plates bolted directly into the hide with visible rivets, a cage built into the ribcage containing screaming souls, heavy iron mask welded over the lower jaw like a muzzle with tubes feeding dark fluid, horns wrapped in barbed wire, digitigrade goat legs with one replaced by a mechanical prosthetic, single burning orange eye visible through a crack in the iron mask, 3.2 meters tall, stylized dark fantasy game boss character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Towering goat demon fused with industrial machinery, meat grinder arm, iron plates bolted into hide, ribcage soul cage, iron jaw muzzle, barbed wire horns, 3.2m, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Raw flesh and rusted industrial iron merged, visible rivets and bolts, spinning blade textures, barbed wire wraps, dark fluid tubes, single burning orange eye through iron mask crack
